failure_modes: False positives due to temporary fluctuations in activity/sleep
Missing individuals with gradual decline not reflected in delta values
Over-reliance on risk_hint without considering other factors
Failure to account for age-related changes in activity/sleep patterns
guardrails: Cross-validate risk_hint with activity and sleep delta values
Consider age when interpreting activity and sleep patterns
Avoid solely relying on delta values; consider absolute activity and sleep averages
Ensure diverse city representation in the final selection
priority_signals: Combination of high risk_hint and negative activity/sleep deltas
planner_result.strategy: The LLM will analyze the candidate pool, prioritizing individuals with high risk hints and significant negative changes in activity and sleep patterns. The deterministic features will be used as supporting evidence to identify citizens with potentially declining well-being trajectories. The LLM will focus on identifying individuals whose activity and sleep patterns are decreasing, especially when combined with a high risk hint.
